Bret Cowart

Experienced
Game Developer

  • Email

    https://youtube.com/@rebrightfx

Languages

  • English (Native)
  • Japanese (Daily Conversation)

Career Profile

Over 15 years of experience working in the software and game development industry on PC, console and mobile game titles and applications.

Worked in various positions, such as engineer, graphics programmer, tools programmer and technical artist.

Experienced in programming tools, 3D graphics and shaders for Unreal Engine, Unity and custom in-house engines.

Adept in development of art tools and improvement of art pipeline workflows.

Proficient in profiling, analysis, optimization and performance tuning of games and applications.

Highly successful in solving complex technical issues.

Career Objective

I want to work for a successful software development company with a positive, creative environment and an international atmosphere.

I am strongly interested in obtaining a permanent senior or mid-level technical position.

I wish to contribute my knowledge and skills to efficiently make engaging, high quality software application experiences.

Career Relocation

I am open to relocating to international locations for my career.

Work Styles

    ■ On-Site
    ■ Hybrid
    ■ Fully Remote

Areas of Expertise

    ■ Technical R&D
    ■ 3D Graphics & Shaders
    ■ Game Engine Programming
    ■ Performance Profiling
    ■ Tools & Workflow
    ■ Art Pipeline Improvement
    ■ Asset Management
    ■ Quality Assurance
    ■ Documentation
    ■ Team Support & Communication

Highlights

■ Developed new technology for gaming and digital entertainment viewing that increases visual definition and enhances appearance of light and surface illumination, self shadowing, image sharpness and detail, visual perception of depth and distance without specialized eye-ware, color-tone richness and color vibrancy.

■ Developed custom technology which resulted in strategic partnership with major game studio to develop a game title based on their game IP.

■ Developed efficient productivity tools and optimized workflows, resulting in reduced production time and development costs, and earned me an MVP award from the company president.

■ Saved a AAA game title’s art production by resolving a critical art tool network issue that prevented the art team from connecting to in-company production servers from home during COVID-19.

■ Improved the Technical Art Team’s in-house technical incident response times after implementing a real-time tool logging and error notification system.

■ Lead initiative to improve Technical Art Team’s code quality and code documentation, improving internal QA and coding professionalism.

Work Experience (Last 10 years)

Lead Developer

2025/01 ~ Present
RebrightFX (Self-Employed)
Tokyo, Japan

Technology Innovation Department

Platforms: PC
R&D Unit
Team Size: 1

Tech: HLSL, Custom shader development tools
Digital Entertainment Enhancement Project
Summary

Researched and developed new complex cinematic post effect for visually enhancing digital image quality and features, and is suitable for use with different kinds of images and popular digital media, including:
games, movies, real-world video and photography, 3d and 2d artwork and animation etc.

Ultra high definition shader post effect features include: improved appearance of light, light emission and surface illumination effects improved self shadowing improved visual perception of spatial depth and distance without specialized eye-ware improved appearance of image definition and sharpness improved appearance of surface details improved color tone richness and color vibrancy

Graphics research and development

Researched real-time graphics techniques for digital image processing and cinematic effects. Developed real-time complex post effect for enhancing digital media image features and quality. Regularly performed image quality analysis, tuning and QA checks across different digital media domains (games, movies, video, 3dcg, 2d art/animation). Regularly increased image quality and improved cinematic look.

Online Website Creation

Developed websites using Jekyll and Wordpress to promote RebrightFX company and UHD media enhancement shader.

Social Media Presence

Created Youtube and X(Twitter) accounts to promote RebrightFX company and UHD media enhancement shader.


Workflow / Tools Programmer

2021/06 ~ 2024/06
Square Enix (Contract)
Tokyo, Japan

Advanced Technology Department

Platforms: PC, Mobile
Workflow Unit
Team Size: 11

Tech: Python, C++, Maya, Unreal Engine 5
Summary

Developed and maintained internal production tools and libraries, assisted in engineering internal technical projects and game titles, contributed to technical research and improving internal operations.

Facial Animation Tools

Worked directly with workflow team lead and contributed to extending capabilities of internal facial animation technology tools and libraries. Provided artists with new features and engineers with new debugging tools for Luminous Engine and Unreal Engine. Served as engineer on AI & ARTS Alchemy project utilizing the in-house facial animation solution, acquired feedback and improved tool quality and features. Placed in charge of writing internal tool user documentation in English and Japanese.

Maya Tools

Upgraded internal Maya tool source code from Python 2 to Python 3, ensuring artists could continue their work and benefit from new features in the latest version of Maya.

Game Programming

Volunteered as support engineer to work on Unreal Engine mobile game development title requiring more manpower, and helped to implement planned features and keep project on schedule.

Info Research

Conducted daily technical research and supplied ATD engineers and artists with valuable info and resources for development and innovation.

Company Engagement

Participated in yearly internal company wide team reviews of accomplished work, providing insight into development successes and failures. Engaged with management and submitted various proposals for improving internal operations and communication with employees.


Technical Artist

2017/09 ~ 2021/02
Cygames (Contract)
Tokyo, Japan

Project Awakening - Arise

Platforms: Playstation (PS4, PS5)
A third person action rpg game.
Team Size: 60

Tech: Python, Maya, C++, Unreal Engine 4
Summary

Developed and maintained internal art tools, resolved tool technical issues, assisted with engineering on game titles, supported and improved art pipeline workflows.

AAA Game Development

Assisted with game character hair shader development in Unreal Engine, and shader debugging on Playstation 4 console systems. Corresponded with Epic Games technical staff to resolve a bug with their Flipboard sprites, required for the game’s effects. Created Unreal Engine game map data exporter for migrating game maps to proprietary game engine. Improved, optimized and extended existing Maya art tools, created character pose management tool, added integrations for Perforce and Autodesk Shotgrid. Developed Maya tools for asset validation, asset production tracking and version management.

Unity Mobile Game Development

Assisted with development of Unity mobile game titles.

Graphics R&D

Researched and developed ambient occlusion techniques optimized for mobile devices.

Internal Operations

Improved internal quality assurance with implementation of a real-time tool usage logging system, enabling the TA team to quickly respond to technical issues, and determine which tools to deprecate or give development priority to. Researched and advised the TA team on coding styles, code analysis tools and technical documentation solutions for improving code quality and development operations.

Technical Incident Response

Resolved a critical technical issue during COVID-19 that affected artists ability to connect remotely from home to internal company servers from Maya and halted art production. This fix allowed the art team to resume art production work of a AAA game title from home.

Localization Work

Assisted with game localization work with game text proof reading, game text data entry and spoken dialogue review.


Unity Developer, Lead Technical Artist

2014/01 ~ 2016/10
Crooz (Full-time)
Tokyo, Japan

Project: Final Fantasy Grandmasters

Platforms: Mobile (iPhone, Android)
A Final Fantasy series rpg game
Team Size: 20 members

Tech: Python, Maya, C++, C#, FBX SDK, Unity 5, NGUI
Summary

In charge of tools and graphics development. Lead initiative to improve art and game asset pipeline workflows.
Researched and developed new technology and overcame complex technical hurdles by implementing creative workarounds.

heading

work contents

Main Contributions

Worked directly with the Art Director to research and develop new technology for new and existing game titles, and to identify and resolve production bottlenecks. Overcame technical limitations and developed novel solution to achieve runtime particle scaling in Unity without the use of private or undocumented Unity API. Helped to spearhead the launch of a new Final Fantasy game title by developing a custom material animation system for Unity and Maya, which helped my team to gain a strategic partnership with Square Enix. Saved the art team hundreds of hours in production time, reducing workloads and costs by developing a suite of automated Unity Editor tools for easy bulk asset validation, import, setup and management, and look-dev tools for QA checks.

Work Award

Received an MVP award from the company President on October 9th 2015 in recognition for my above contributions to the company.
